title: allantodia crenata var. glabra
intro: Allantodia crenata var. glabra is a species of fern, belonging to the family Athyriaceae, commonly found in China. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Allantodia crenata var. glabra include its ability to relieve fever, reduce inflammation, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and cough. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and stems, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for use in traditional medicine.
